Functions and headers for ARM MCU management, mutex operations, system functions, and build scripts.

## Folders
- **[include](include/README.md)**: Functions and headers for ARM MCU management and OS macros for assertions, memory, and mutexes.
- **[mcu](mcu/README.md)**: Functions for ARM I-Cache, D-Cache, FPU, interrupts, and thread privilege management.

## Files
- **[mutex_freertos.c](mutex_freertos.c.md)**: Implements mutex and recursive mutex operations using FreeRTOS for the Pebble firmware.
- **[platform.c](platform.c.md)**: Default implementations for system-specific functions in libos, with weak linkage for easy overriding.
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Helper library for easier software development on FreeRTOS on ARM, used by main and Bluetooth firmware.
- **[tick.c](tick.c.md)**: Functions to convert between milliseconds and FreeRTOS ticks.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling the libos static library with specific environment configurations.
